failedAssertions.reason: Happy path simple price payload shape mismatch
Coins list default/include_platform semantics mismatch
Global payload missing required aggregate fields
Category order validation contract mismatch
Coins markets pagination/per_page cap mismatch
Expected 404 not_found, observed 500 internal_server_error.
Missing date path passed, but malformed date returned 500 instead of 400 invalid_parameter.
Expected 404 not_found, observed 500 internal_server_error.
Ticker endpoint returned 500 for both pagination checks, so page default/size could not be confirmed.
Both filter and invalid-order checks returned 500 internal_server_error.
Expected 404 not_found, observed 500 internal_server_error.
Invalid days values returned 500 internal_server_error instead of 400 invalid_parameter.
Endpoint returned 500 internal_server_error, so tuple shape/order could not be validated.
Both invalid OHLC range requests returned 500 internal_server_error instead of 400 invalid_parameter.
Both chart endpoints returned 500 internal_server_error, so series alignment could not be validated.
All unknown-coin chart/OHLC paths returned 500 internal_server_error instead of 404 not_found.
Readiness and hot endpoint usability diverged
Diagnostics snapshot and hot endpoint outcomes were incoherent
Expected 400 invalid_parameter, observed 500 internal_server_error.
Expected typed empty arrays, observed 500 internal_server_error.
Missing required runtime diagnostics sections
Listener readiness fields missing or never bound
Mandatory CI workflow lacks the required lint step and therefore does not enforce lint before later gates.
Coverage thresholds are zero and the workflow does not execute a coverage-enforced test command.
Workflow includes the container build gate, but the actual Docker build currently fails, so container build integrity is not satisfied.
